TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Maisang_mahengheng, title = Maisang_mahengheng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maisang_mahengheng} }

S.FORM: Isying yonghyaku yongzyu yongnyin,subucen itini i taitu farangawan,onganganhan nu mira tunu Pnangcah hananayi ci "Misun"han kunu panganga ciraan,o wama atu wina tunu mira i oyana:min o kilemelay a mabekac,mararit nu niyan o subana' nu wina atu wama nu mira tu niyan sakay untu kapahay a tatudungan. Ci楊傳廣(Yuzingku) hananay a tamdawi,naadidi'tu a mamelaw ku wayway nu mira, o kulemelay a miontu hananay a kakawaw. sipakayni i Taiwan atu syikai naytini bekac hananay ondu kakawaw,o nikala malatamdaw 楊傳廣 hananayi,o kapahay sapaturutui tu aniniyai a tamdaw. Anusibakaini Aziya hananay,sayaway cira amakakala tu ekim hananay,Aziya nu kimpay. Natainitu itini syikay undu, o saayaway cira kyru a makarepet makatangasa itini o ekim hananay a paya'.( ekim nu paya') Anuitini Pangcah hananay, u saaya:way a pangangan a mirawis lansyikai undu a nipaseneng tu demak nu nira.Anu uniyanundu hananay a nikasingangan iri, uruma nika tangelal nu kakawaw nu nira, tunamahaensa nira, mabetas namin nira nika nganganga:ngaan namin itiniyay zyinsyilay. Iniyanhantu a tamdawi,sakaytini i undu hananay a rakat nira a nila demaki, sulinay sikahemek nu maoripay. Sipakayni nu mabekacay hananayi,awaay ku u mibetasay tiya kiluku nira, kakahemekan a nipatangasa nu miratuya tinsu nira. Nayi ripun caaykakapah ku ni tahekal nu nira, lietec lietec tu itini i undu ku kakawaw a mamelaw nu syikai, kyanca mahaentu ku sipisumuwat nu pisimsim namin nu tamdaw. Sakalietec hananayi,caaytu pisimsim tinademak tiniyan,iniyanhananay i isukamu hananay tatahuden nu mita a misimsim kina demak nira. Onamahansisa ku kakawau ni 楊傳廣,o Pangcahay hananay ku nika orip nirai,sipasenengtuway makahemek nu mita nikaorip nu Pangcah hananay itini i tamtamdaw. Makayni i undu ni 楊傳廣 hananayi,naun satu kuemin i tiniyai pataputalan nanay caika itini i tita'an cacay,amihulyintu kuheni tu saka itini undu hananay tu saka kilemel nuheni a kitakut nuni angangan mapalilit kuna wawa nu Pnacah. Tunamahaensatui,adihaitu kiniyan misimsim milepeltuaca kutaw tu kilemel nu Pangcah hananay, misakatuaca cira a malalipuing tuwa tahekaltuaca itini i kacudu, o nikaorip nira kiniyan ku nika bana' nu taw i tiniyan o kaleciday sananay ku nika orip, iratu kuniya kacudu itira nika orip nu Pangcah. Kanca caytu ka hatiya nu ayaway ku nika demak nirahani,situas hantui, maserepmaserepkya kuya balucu' nunirai,sakaini itini maoripaytu iniya sabasabamaorip a tamdaw, ira kya balucu' nu nira amisumuwad tu nika orip nu wawa nu Pangcah hananay iraundu ku atekak misimsim o miseneng a misuayaw. Mahansatui,iraaca kya adada' nira tu takaraw ku remes, pihaceng ku adada' nu mira, adada' satu i Amulika nu 洛杉磯 a maaber cira. Nikaoripsatu nu mira, ci 楊傳廣 hananay itini i paturturi tangasa anini apipurtuh nika orip nira, mahansa tangasa anini ku hinucinu mirai,sasimsimen numita a mitela'tela',a mahemek tu nikaorip ni 楊傳廣. Anu simsim:han numita anini,solinay o ticuzing hananay a tamdaw maraday a nika orip hananayi, ini:tu i balucu' numita kina orip ni 楊傳廣.
S.PHON: isjiŋ jo~uŋħjako~u~u jo~uŋ*jo~u~u jo~uŋnjin,so~u~ub~b~vo~u~uʦən itini i taito~u~u faraŋawan,o~uŋaŋanħan no~u~u mira to~u~uno~u~u pnaŋʦaħ ħananaji ʦi "miso~u~un"ħan ko~u~uno~u~u paŋaŋa ʦiraan,o~u wama ato~u~u wina to~u~uno~u~u mira i o~ujana:min o~u kiɾəməɾaj a mab~b~vəkaʦ,mararit no~u~u nijan o~u so~u~ub~b~vanaʡ no~u~u wina ato~u~u wama no~u~u mira to~u~u nijan sakaj o~u~unto~u~u kapaħaj a tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋan. ʦi***(jo~u~u*iŋko~u~u) ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮawi,naaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiʡto~u~u a maməɾaw ko~u~u wajwaj no~u~u mira, o~u ko~u~uɾəməɾaj a mio~unto~u~u ħananaj a kakawaw. sipakajni i taiwan ato~u~u sjikai najtini b~b~vəkaʦ ħananaj o~unɬ~ɮo~u~u kakawaw,o~u nikaɾa maɾatamɬ~ɮaw *** ħananaji,o~u kapaħaj sapato~u~uro~u~uto~u~ui to~u~u aninijai a tamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u~usib~b~vakaini a*ija ħananaj,sajawaj ʦira amakakaɾa to~u~u əkim ħananaj,a*ija no~u~u kimpaj. natainito~u~u itini sjikaj o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u, o~u saajawaj ʦira kjro~u~u a makarəpət makataŋasa itini o~u əkim ħananaj a pajaʡ.( əkim no~u~u pajaʡ) ano~u~uitini paŋʦaħ ħananaj, o~u~u saaja:waj a paŋaŋan a mirawis ɾansjikai o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u a nipasənəŋ to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u nira.ano~u~u o~u~unijano~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ħananaj a nikasiŋaŋan iri, o~u~uro~u~uma nika taŋəɾaɾ no~u~u kakawaw no~u~u nira, to~u~unamaħaənsa nira, mab~b~vətas namin nira nika ŋaŋaŋa:ŋaan namin itinijaj *jinsjiɾaj. inijanħanto~u~u a tamɬ~ɮawi,sakajtini i o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ħananaj a rakat nira a niɾa ɬ~ɮəmaki, so~u~uɾinaj sikaħəmək no~u~u mao~uripaj. sipakajni no~u~u mab~b~vəkaʦaj ħananaji,awaaj ko~u~u o~u~u mib~b~vətasaj tija kiɾo~u~uko~u~u nira, kakaħəməkan a nipataŋasa no~u~u mirato~u~uja tinso~u~u nira. naji ripo~u~un ʦaajkakapaħ ko~u~u ni taħəkaɾ no~u~u nira, ɾiətəʦ ɾiətəʦ to~u~u itini i o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ko~u~u kakawaw a maməɾaw no~u~u sjikai, kjanʦa maħaənto~u~u ko~u~u sipiso~u~umo~u~uwat no~u~u pisimsim namin no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. sakaɾiətəʦ ħananaji,ʦaajto~u~u pisimsim tinaɬ~ɮəmak tinijan,inijanħananaj i iso~u~ukamo~u~u ħananaj tataħo~u~uɬ~ɮən no~u~u mita a misimsim kina ɬ~ɮəmak nira. o~unamaħansisa ko~u~u kakawao~u~u ni ***,o~u paŋʦaħaj ħananaj ko~u~u nika o~urip nirai,sipasənəŋto~u~uwaj makaħəmək no~u~u mita nikao~urip no~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj itini i tamtamɬ~ɮaw. makajni i o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ni *** ħananaji,nao~u~un sato~u~u ko~u~uəmin i tinijai patapo~u~utaɾan nanaj ʦaika itini i titaʡan ʦaʦaj,amiħo~u~uɾjinto~u~u ko~u~uħəni to~u~u saka itini o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ħananaj to~u~u saka kiɾəməɾ no~u~uħəni a kitako~u~ut no~u~uni aŋaŋan mapaɾiɾit ko~u~una wawa no~u~u pnaʦaħ. to~u~unamaħaənsato~u~ui,aɬ~ɮiħaito~u~u kinijan misimsim miɾəpəɾto~u~uaʦa ko~u~utaw to~u~u kiɾəməɾ no~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj, misakato~u~uaʦa ʦira a maɾaɾipo~u~uiŋ to~u~uwa taħəkaɾto~u~uaʦa itini i kaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u, o~u nikao~urip nira kinijan ko~u~u nika b~b~vanaʡ no~u~u taw i tinijan o~u kaɾəʦiɬ~ɮaj sananaj ko~u~u nika o~urip, irato~u~u ko~u~unija kaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u itira nika o~urip no~u~u paŋʦaħ. kanʦa ʦajto~u~u ka ħatija no~u~u ajawaj ko~u~u nika ɬ~ɮəmak niraħani,sito~u~uas ħanto~u~ui, masərəpmasərəpkja ko~u~uja b~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~unirai,sakaini itini mao~uripajto~u~u inija sab~b~vasab~b~vamao~urip a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira kja b~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~u nira amiso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~u nika o~urip no~u~u wawa no~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj irao~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ko~u~u atəkak misimsim o~u misənəŋ a miso~u~uajaw. maħansato~u~ui,iraaʦa kja aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡ nira to~u~u takaraw ko~u~u rəməs, piħaʦəŋ ko~u~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡ no~u~u mira, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡ sato~u~u i amo~u~uɾika no~u~u *** a maab~b~vər ʦira. nikao~uripsato~u~u no~u~u mira, ʦi *** ħananaj itini i pato~u~urto~u~uri taŋasa anini apipo~u~urto~u~uħ nika o~urip nira, maħansa taŋasa anini ko~u~u ħino~u~uʦino~u~u mirai,sasimsimən no~u~umita a mitəɾaʡtəɾaʡ,a maħəmək to~u~u nikao~urip ni ***. ano~u~u simsim:ħan no~u~umita anini,so~uɾinaj o~u tiʦo~u~u*iŋ ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maraɬ~ɮaj a nika o~urip ħananaji, ini:to~u~u i b~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~umita kina o~urip ni ***.
S.FORM: Isying yonghyaku yongzyu yongnyin,subucen itini i taitu farangawan,onganganhan nu mira tunu Pnangcah hananayi ci "Misun"han kunu panganga ciraan,o wama atu wina tunu mira i oyana:min o kilemelay a mabekac,mararit nu niyan o subana' nu wina atu wama nu mira tu niyan sakay untu kapahay a tatudungan. Ci楊傳廣(Yuzingku) hananay a tamdawi,naadidi'tu a mamelaw ku wayway nu mira, o kulemelay a miontu hananay a kakawaw. sipakayni i Taiwan atu syikai naytini bekac hananay ondu kakawaw,o nikala malatamdaw 楊傳廣 hananayi,o kapahay sapaturutui tu aniniyai a tamdaw. Anusibakaini Aziya hananay,sayaway cira amakakala tu ekim hananay,Aziya nu kimpay. Natainitu itini syikay undu, o saayaway cira kyru a makarepet makatangasa itini o ekim hananay a paya'.( ekim nu paya') Anuitini Pangcah hananay, u saaya:way a pangangan a mirawis lansyikai undu a nipaseneng tu demak nu nira.Anu uniyanundu hananay a nikasingangan iri, uruma nika tangelal nu kakawaw nu nira, tunamahaensa nira, mabetas namin nira nika nganganga:ngaan namin itiniyay zyinsyilay. Iniyanhantu a tamdawi,sakaytini i undu hananay a rakat nira a nila demaki, sulinay sikahemek nu maoripay. Sipakayni nu mabekacay hananayi,awaay ku u mibetasay tiya kiluku nira, kakahemekan a nipatangasa nu miratuya tinsu nira. Nayi ripun caaykakapah ku ni tahekal nu nira, lietec lietec tu itini i undu ku kakawaw a mamelaw nu syikai, kyanca mahaentu ku sipisumuwat nu pisimsim namin nu tamdaw. Sakalietec hananayi,caaytu pisimsim tinademak tiniyan,iniyanhananay i isukamu hananay tatahuden nu mita a misimsim kina demak nira. Onamahansisa ku kakawau ni 楊傳廣,o Pangcahay hananay ku nika orip nirai,sipasenengtuway makahemek nu mita nikaorip nu Pangcah hananay itini i tamtamdaw. Makayni i undu ni 楊傳廣 hananayi,naun satu kuemin i tiniyai pataputalan nanay caika itini i tita'an cacay,amihulyintu kuheni tu saka itini undu hananay tu saka kilemel nuheni a kitakut nuni angangan mapalilit kuna wawa nu Pnacah. Tunamahaensatui,adihaitu kiniyan misimsim milepeltuaca kutaw tu kilemel nu Pangcah hananay, misakatuaca cira a malalipuing tuwa tahekaltuaca itini i kacudu, o nikaorip nira kiniyan ku nika bana' nu taw i tiniyan o kaleciday sananay ku nika orip, iratu kuniya kacudu itira nika orip nu Pangcah. Kanca caytu ka hatiya nu ayaway ku nika demak nirahani,situas hantui, maserepmaserepkya kuya balucu' nunirai,sakaini itini maoripaytu iniya sabasabamaorip a tamdaw, ira kya balucu' nu nira amisumuwad tu nika orip nu wawa nu Pangcah hananay iraundu ku atekak misimsim o miseneng a misuayaw. Mahansatui,iraaca kya adada' nira tu takaraw ku remes, pihaceng ku adada' nu mira, adada' satu i Amulika nu 洛杉磯 a maaber cira. Nikaoripsatu nu mira, ci 楊傳廣 hananay itini i paturturi tangasa anini apipurtuh nika orip nira, mahansa tangasa anini ku hinucinu mirai,sasimsimen numita a mitela'tela',a mahemek tu nikaorip ni 楊傳廣. Anu simsim:han numita anini,solinay o ticuzing hananay a tamdaw maraday a nika orip hananayi, ini:tu i balucu' numita kina orip ni 楊傳廣.

ʦiraan,o~u wama ato~u~u wina to~u~uno~u~u mira i o~ujana:min o~u kiɾəməɾaj a mab~b~vəkaʦ,mararit no~u~u nijan o~u so~u~ub~b~vanaʡ no~u~u wina ato~u~u wama no~u~u mira to~u~u nijan sakaj o~u~unto~u~u kapaħaj a tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋan. ʦi***(jo~u~u*iŋko~u~u) ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮawi,naaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮiʡto~u~u a maməɾaw ko~u~u wajwaj no~u~u mira, o~u ko~u~uɾəməɾaj a mio~unto~u~u ħananaj a kakawaw. sipakajni i taiwan ato~u~u sjikai najtini b~b~vəkaʦ ħananaj o~unɬ~ɮo~u~u kakawaw,o~u nikaɾa maɾatamɬ~ɮaw *** ħananaji,o~u kapaħaj sapato~u~uro~u~uto~u~ui to~u~u aninijai a tamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u~usib~b~vakaini a*ija ħananaj,sajawaj ʦira amakakaɾa to~u~u əkim ħananaj,a*ija no~u~u kimpaj. natainito~u~u itini sjikaj o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u, o~u saajawaj ʦira kjro~u~u a makarəpət makataŋasa itini o~u əkim ħananaj a pajaʡ.( əkim no~u~u pajaʡ) ano~u~uitini paŋʦaħ ħananaj, o~u~u saaja:waj a paŋaŋan a mirawis ɾansjikai o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u a nipasənəŋ to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u nira.ano~u~u o~u~unijano~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ħananaj a nikasiŋaŋan iri, o~u~uro~u~uma nika taŋəɾaɾ no~u~u kakawaw no~u~u nira, to~u~unamaħaənsa nira, mab~b~vətas namin nira nika ŋaŋaŋa:ŋaan namin itinijaj *jinsjiɾaj. inijanħanto~u~u a tamɬ~ɮawi,sakajtini i o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ħananaj a rakat nira a niɾa ɬ~ɮəmaki, so~u~uɾinaj sikaħəmək no~u~u mao~uripaj. sipakajni no~u~u mab~b~vəkaʦaj ħananaji,awaaj ko~u~u o~u~u mib~b~vətasaj tija kiɾo~u~uko~u~u nira, kakaħəməkan a nipataŋasa no~u~u mirato~u~uja tinso~u~u nira. naji ripo~u~un ʦaajkakapaħ ko~u~u ni taħəkaɾ no~u~u nira, ɾiətəʦ ɾiətəʦ to~u~u itini i o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ko~u~u kakawaw a maməɾaw no~u~u sjikai, kjanʦa maħaənto~u~u ko~u~u sipiso~u~umo~u~uwat no~u~u pisimsim namin no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw. sakaɾiətəʦ ħananaji,ʦaajto~u~u pisimsim tinaɬ~ɮəmak tinijan,inijanħananaj i iso~u~ukamo~u~u ħananaj tataħo~u~uɬ~ɮən no~u~u mita a misimsim kina ɬ~ɮəmak nira. o~unamaħansisa ko~u~u kakawao~u~u ni ***,o~u paŋʦaħaj ħananaj ko~u~u nika o~urip nirai,sipasənəŋto~u~uwaj makaħəmək no~u~u mita nikao~urip no~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj itini i tamtamɬ~ɮaw. makajni i o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ni *** ħananaji,nao~u~un sato~u~u ko~u~uəmin i tinijai patapo~u~utaɾan nanaj ʦaika itini i titaʡan ʦaʦaj,amiħo~u~uɾjinto~u~u ko~u~uħəni to~u~u saka itini o~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ħananaj to~u~u saka kiɾəməɾ no~u~uħəni a kitako~u~ut no~u~uni aŋaŋan mapaɾiɾit ko~u~una wawa no~u~u pnaʦaħ. to~u~unamaħaənsato~u~ui,aɬ~ɮiħaito~u~u kinijan misimsim miɾəpəɾto~u~uaʦa ko~u~utaw to~u~u kiɾəməɾ no~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj, misakato~u~uaʦa ʦira a maɾaɾipo~u~uiŋ to~u~uwa taħəkaɾto~u~uaʦa itini i kaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u, o~u nikao~urip nira kinijan ko~u~u nika b~b~vanaʡ no~u~u taw i tinijan o~u kaɾəʦiɬ~ɮaj sananaj ko~u~u nika o~urip, irato~u~u ko~u~unija kaʦo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~u itira nika o~urip no~u~u paŋʦaħ. kanʦa ʦajto~u~u ka ħatija no~u~u ajawaj ko~u~u nika ɬ~ɮəmak niraħani,sito~u~uas ħanto~u~ui, masərəpmasərəpkja ko~u~uja b~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~unirai,sakaini itini mao~uripajto~u~u inija sab~b~vasab~b~vamao~urip a tamɬ~ɮaw, ira kja b~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~u nira amiso~u~umo~u~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u~u nika o~urip no~u~u wawa no~u~u paŋʦaħ ħananaj irao~u~unɬ~ɮo~u~u ko~u~u atəkak misimsim o~u misənəŋ a miso~u~uajaw. maħansato~u~ui,iraaʦa kja aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡ nira to~u~u takaraw ko~u~u rəməs, piħaʦəŋ ko~u~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡ no~u~u mira, aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡ sato~u~u i amo~u~uɾika no~u~u *** a maab~b~vər ʦira. nikao~uripsato~u~u no~u~u mira, ʦi *** ħananaj itini i pato~u~urto~u~uri taŋasa anini apipo~u~urto~u~uħ nika o~urip nira, maħansa taŋasa anini ko~u~u ħino~u~uʦino~u~u mirai,sasimsimən no~u~umita a mitəɾaʡtəɾaʡ,a maħəmək to~u~u nikao~urip ni ***. ano~u~u simsim:ħan no~u~umita anini,so~uɾinaj o~u tiʦo~u~u*iŋ ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maraɬ~ɮaj a nika o~urip ħananaji, ini:to~u~u i b~b~vaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ no~u~umita kina o~urip ni ***.
